title: HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON - 211info
text: HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet adoptions (all of which have been spayed and neutered), shelter, lost and found reporting program, HOPE Pet Food Bank, community cat program, and cremation services. Also offers Deschutes County dog licensing and renewal. Spay Neuter Assistance Program (SNAP) vouchers available that can be used at several different veterinary offices. 61170 SE 27th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5:30pm, additional times may be available by appointment Email (541) 382-3537 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 382-3537 Shelter Alternate (541) 693-6911 Animal Control Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Adoption: Visit shelter or website to see pets and download an Adoption Questionnaire located under the tab Adopt Pet surrender: Visit website to submit intake request located under the tab Rehoming Lost pets: Visit website for resources and photos of found animals located under the tab Lost Pets or call shelter for more information Found pets: Call shelter to file a report or to notify staff you will be arriving with a found animal (during business hours). After hours call Animal Control. Check website if outside Deschutes County for a list of the closest shelter (located under the tab Lost Pets) Other services: Call shelter for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5:30pm Services: Animal Adoption Animal Licenses Animal Shelters Neuter/Spay Services Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON
